name: Crockpot Chicken and Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the 3 cans of cream of chicken, celery, and mushroom soups into the crock-pot.
2. Add the minute rice on top of the soup mixture.
3. Place the chicken breasts on top of the rice.
4. Cook for 3 hours on high or 4 hours on low.
5. Makes 4 servings. For 6 servings, add an additional half cup of rice and two more chicken breasts.
